channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Raphael Does New York in Splendid Met Exhibition
item.description: The forever savant, new courtier style, Madonnas, killer portraits, altarpieces, and more.

item.title: The British Equality Trap: Equal Pay for Unequal Work
item.description: The U.K.’s foolish approach to wage discrimination has left a host of economic problems in its wake.

item.title: The Coming Tsunami of Chinese AI
item.description: Export controls undermine America’s long-term technological edge.

item.title: Virginia’s Pro-Gerrymander Dems Argued Election Is Single Day After Forcing 45-Day Vote
item.description: The Supreme Court needed to explain what the definition of an 'election' is, so that Democrats could understand.
